name: Toshida Shogoro

appearance.hair: None. His head is a large three-dimensional speech bubble — white with a pointed tail — and his face is rendered on its surface in clean black ink. Expressions shift like a cartoon.
appearance.build: Athletic and surprisingly normal below the neck. The head is the thing.
appearance.other: His face-expressions on the bubble surface change rapidly to match his emotional state — broad grins, exaggerated shock, sweat drops. These are automatic and cannot be hidden. He has tried. It has never worked.

personality.summary: Dramatic and enthusiastic in everything he does. His heteromorph physiology lends itself to this — an expressive cartoon face is hard to use subtly. He has committed to full expressiveness as a life philosophy. He is exactly as much as he appears to be, at all times.
personality.in_class: Takes notes. His face shows exactly what he thinks of every lesson in real time. Teachers have mixed feelings about this.
personality.in_combat: His ability is chaotic-area by nature and his combat approach reflects that. He's loud about it. Announces his moves. Has been told to stop announcing his moves. Cannot stop announcing his moves.
personality.quirk_of_character: His head has gotten stuck in the dorm doorframe three times. He treats this as evidence that the doorframe is out to get him. He has named the doorframe Hiroshi.

ability_scores.note: CHA primary (Comic is expression and performance made physical — the quirk manifests as visual/emotional projections, governed by force of personality). TECH secondary for precision of text and effects.

class_note: Star Performer's performance-linked abilities directly synergise with Comic's expressive, audience-affecting mechanics.

quirk_mechanics.weakness: Effects are visible to everyone, including allies. Toshida cannot create Comic effects silently or subtly. Anything he creates in combat is clearly labelled as coming from him.

abilities.name: Sound Effect
abilities.description: Manifest a giant comic-style sound effect word (CRASH, BOOM, SLAM) in a 20-foot area within 60 feet. All creatures in the area make CON save vs Quirk DC. Fail: deafened for 1 minute, take 3d8 thunder damage, knocked prone. Success: half damage, not prone. The word remains visible for 1 minute as difficult terrain (physical letters manifest as real objects).

abilities.name: Motion Lines
abilities.description: Project comic motion lines onto up to 3 creatures within 60 ft. Affected creatures cannot take reactions and have disadvantage on opportunity attack rolls until the start of Toshida's next turn.

abilities.name: Panel Shift
abilities.description: Create a comic panel border around up to 4 creatures within 30 ft. Affected creatures must make INT save vs Quirk DC or become briefly confused by a reality-overlay effect — on fail, all movement is halved and the creature must move in a straight line until end of their turn.

dm_notes.combat_role: Disruption and area denial. His Sound Effect creates difficult terrain and prone enemies; Motion Lines strip reactions from key targets. He's not a striker but he creates the conditions that make strikers devastating.
dm_notes.social_role: Class morale engine. When things go badly, his face is readable and his response to bad news is usually — somehow — funny. He doesn't mean to be. He just can't hide how he's processing things.
dm_notes.growth_arc: Learning discretion. His cartoon-expressiveness is a liability in covert missions and emotional conversations with stakes. Finding out that sometimes the most powerful thing is silence — and sitting with that knowledge.
dm_notes.weakness_to_exploit: Every ability telegraphs. Enemies always know what he's doing and where it's coming from. Low WIS means he doesn't always read the situation correctly before acting.
